Off Calendar Mar-21-2008 Continued To May-14-08 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Feb-26-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- ATTY. ROBERT S. GOTTESMAN, TEL. NO. 982-9211 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. TRACY C. LEMMON OF THE LAW OFFICES OF BRAGG & KULUVA, TEL. NO. 273-6500 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS/CROSS DEFENDANTS LAURA COURTNEY;SHUMAN FINE PAPERS AND PAPAYRUS FRANCHISE CORP;
ATTY. JOHN A. NODA OF THE LAW OFFICES OF KERN, NODA, DEVINE & SEGAL, TEL. NO. 474-1900 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS AND MOVING PARTIES.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED IT'S TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS - DEFENDANTS DONG NGUYEN AND YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE, INC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED BECAUSE PLAINTIFF HAS NOT OPPOSED DEFENDANT'S MOTION THE FACTS IN DEFENDANT'S SEPARATE STATEMENT ARE ESTABLISHED AS TO THE PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT HAS NO LIABILITY TO PLAINTIFF. BECAUSE DEFENDANT'S CROSS-CLAIM IS FOR INDEMNITY AND THERE IS NOT PRIMARY LIABILITY THERE IS NOTHING TO INDEMNIFY. IN ANY EVENT, THERE IS NO TRIABLE ISSUES OF MATERIAL FACT AS TO DEFENDANT BEING LEGALLY STOPPED IN A WHITE ZONE. SO, ON THE MERITS, DEFENDANT HAS ESTABLISHED ITS LACK OF LIABILITY. OBJECTION TO THE LEMMEN DECLARATION IS SUSTAINED AS TO PARAGRAPH 3 AND EXHIBIT B FOR LACK OF FOUNDATION. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER PURSUANT TO CCP 437 C(G). Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR# 8189 =301/PJB/ALT

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-14-2007 Set For Trial On Jun-16-08 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On May-28-08 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 514
